description_long: This is a stone pedestal fountain set on a rectangular concrete base, likely intended for public or park use. The fountain features a cylindrical column with a slightly flared octagonal base and a round, scalloped-edged top, which may serve as a shallow basin. The column has a plaque or inscription panel on one side and a small circular opening, possibly for a spout or water outlet, on another. The surface of the fountain shows signs of weathering, with patches of moss or lichen, especially on the shaded side. The surrounding base is paved, with a raised curb on one side and scattered dry leaves, indicating outdoor placement. There are no visible water features or active jets in the current state.
description: A weathered stone pedestal fountain with a round, scalloped-edged top and a rectangular paved base, featuring a plaque and curb detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plaque on the column and the main approach, with the scalloped basin top clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a small circular opening on the column and highlights the raised curb and debris along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain back of the column and the full extent of the rectangular base with scattered leaves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows moss or lichen growth on the column and the curb running along the left edge of the base.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a scalloped edge around the circular basin and an octagonal base, with a rectangular plaque or inscription panel on the front. There is visible weathering and moss, but no elaborate carvings or sculptures.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is round with a scalloped rim, shallow in depth, and sits atop a cylindrical column. There are no visible tiers or compartments.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: The fountain is set on a rectangular paved base with a raised curb on one side and scattered dry leaves, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible jets or spray patterns are present; the fountain appears inactive with no water flow.
